framework.name: User Approval Gates
framework.description: Workflow component that pauses execution and requires human review before proceeding. Used as safety mechanism for high-stakes decisions (urgent emails, financial commitments). Prevents fully autonomous agents from making irreversible mistakes.
framework.raw_quote: For the else path, I add a user approval block from the logic category. This pauses the workflow and asks me to review urgent emails manually.

source.title: NEW ChatGPT Agent Builder: From Zero to Automation Hero (2026 Guide)
